title: Manganese-substituted lithium iron phosphate cathodes
abstract: Reports LiFePO4 cathodes with 0%, 5%, and 10% Mn substitution. Low Mn fractions improved conductivity proxy while preserving stability under the reported threshold.

title: Boundary effects in manganese-doped LiFePO4
abstract: Discusses possible instability at high Mn substitution and recommends focused screens between known stable low-Mn and unstable high-Mn regimes.
